Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 45
DMG: 15 Dmg Bonus: 155
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 11.0 Size: LARGE
Class: ALL except BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Burnished Wooden Stave
Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 45
DMG: 15 Dmg Bonus: 155
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 11.0 Size: LARGE
Class: ALL except BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Blunt
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:4 pp 9 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:99

Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-14 07:54:08
Page Updated:Sat Sep 7th, 2019

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 100pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Chardok
NPC Name
a Reanimated Berserker
a Reanimated Conscript
a Reanimated Partisan
a Tortured Iksar Miner

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Commonlands
Quest Name
Nalla's Problem: A Grahzkel Orc Ambush

Warsliks Woods
Quest Name
Burnished Wooden Staff
Used in 1 recipe.
Recipe list - Premium only.

Chardok

Not needed for VP?
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2004 at 3:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591810137246
12 posts
Think since last big patch this is not needed anymore for the VP key quest. There is a new one now for the VP key..not sure if this one will even work any longer. Am I right or wrong?
▲ Page top
Not needed for VP?
QuoteReply
# Jun 12 2007 at 2:34 PM Rating: Decent
Stammz
Sage
54 posts
Still quite sought after on Al`Kabor where we have the old VP and only the old key quest as well

▲ Page top
RE: Not needed for VP?
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2004 at 11:17 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1661732332556
Guru
6,998 posts
You're half-right. You can either complete the raid event + the old VP key quest (including this one), or complete the raid event + gather the three essences from Charasis, Chardok, and Sebilis.
▲ Page top
RE: Not needed for VP?
QuoteReply
# Aug 13 2004 at 12:06 AM Rating: Decent
Juion
Scholar
50 posts
I'd like to add something about those essences. I was following a couple of time-geared 65s into chardok so I could get to the Lorekeeper camp for Grand Tunic of the Oracle. They engaged the Essence of Chardok, I had druid cold resist buff on, the AE hit me for 2000 and then the mob smacked me once for 400. I'm glad my group had a cleric.
▲ Page top
Berserkers and champs
QuoteReply
# May 24 2004 at 6:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1714954568226
67 posts
While camping the battlemaster we got alot of these staves from the reanimated berserkers and champions. They are in GY before the entrance to the royals. It wasnt a hard camp and they dropped often, compared to the other skeles on the way down to the bridges. These would be the quickest way to get them.

-Elder Danknugzz Arethegoodnugzz- -65 Beastlord- Torvo
http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=999412
▲ Page top

Got one to drop today off of A Reanimated Partisan at the bridge. Looks exactly the same as the conscript.

# Aug 02 2005 at 6:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1609114659899
11 posts
I just got one from a Reanimated Partisan too. He did NOT carry anything in his hand, and he did NOT crush me when he attacked. Only way to know whether he had one was to kill him and loot it.

Edited, Mon May 1 11:27:41 2006

Burnished Wooden Stave
QuoteReply
# May 27 2003 at 10:50 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1659917792623
18 posts
Dropped off a Reanimated Conscript for me just at the bridge just inside the fort near zone
▲ Page top
price
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2002 at 8:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763140376
182 posts
If you hunt a lot in Chardok (like most darkies 50+ on Tallon do) than you'll see plenty of these drop. They only sell for 3ppish to vendors, and weight 11. Therefor most people don't even bother to pick them up and let them rot. I've seen higher level lights though that wanted to buy them since it's very hard for them to hunt there. The price they pay for it really depends on person to person. Some will pay 50pp, some up to 500. You can't really put a price on a quest item, except maybe if it's really rare, which this isn't.
▲ Page top
...
QuoteReply
# Oct 18 2001 at 1:11 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591758692136
11 posts
umm its for VP key, wtf cares how much its worth....save me the time it takes to wait for one to drop and I pay a k or more to get that part out of the way
▲ Page top
RE: ...
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2004 at 1:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
Go to the Bazaar and you can usually find one for less than 100pp; that's not too much time to spend to avoiding paying 1k or more, hehe. Or just get from the source, again not too much time as this item is common as dirt. While I was camping the iksar betrayer for my epic down there about 4 of these dropped an hour, after a while we quit bothering to loot them.
▲ Page top
RE: ...
QuoteReply
# Oct 27 2003 at 1:39 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591786867381
126 posts
LOL I totally agree. Time saved is worth 1k+ in my opinion. I have too much to do as it is.

Where It Drops
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2001 at 12:09 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This drops commonly off various sarnaks inside Chardok. It's also part of the quest for the Veeshan's Peak key.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 07 2001 at 7:43 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) this staff stinks. You sold it for that much cuz the guy prolly needed it for the VP key quest
RE: VP key quest
QuoteReply
# Nov 13 2002 at 9:09 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
Hehe, was wondering why a 2hb weapon worse that what you can get in Dalnir dropped in Chardok... well now I know, it's a quest item. Part of one of the subquests that eventually gets you a key to Veeshan's Peak. Guess I'll hold on to it (or go ahead and turn it in for the quest piece, or just sell it to someone who wants a VP key.)
▲ Page top
A lil Info
QuoteReply
# May 02 2001 at 1:39 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
My druid used this staff for a short while.
Here is the little information I have heard about it, this is as yet unconfirmed.

Random drop in Chardok
Worth around 100pp in December 2000

I sold for 250pp and a Glowing Wooden Crook, which was an excellent deal for me since the staff was originally GIVEN to me by a high level pally. This puts the price at which I sold it ar around 300-350pp, NOT 7!

Thunderous Silenc
30th Bard, Innoruuk Server
